googleReviews.text:
I’ve been a customer at Valliani Jewelers a couple times, and every experience has been great. The staff is always very helpful and welcoming. I’m giving 4 stars instead of 5 because I would have appreciated a more thorough explanation of the payment process and available payment options.
That said, Jamal was incredibly helpful in assisting me with picking out a ring for my boyfriend, and he absolutely loved it! Thank you so much, Jamal, for your excellent help and service.

I had a fantastic experience at Demi and Valliani Jewelers in Southland! The staff was incredibly friendly and knowledgeable, guiding me through their beautiful ring collection. They took the time to understand my preferences and provided clear pricing, making the entire process enjoyable. I left with a stunning ring and felt truly valued as a customer. Highly recommend them for anyone looking for quality jewelry and excellent service!

The women here are very welcoming and genuinely make you feel excited about finding a piece you love. I do believe they enjoy helping customers, but they are also very skilled at making a sale.
I came across a malachite clover-style necklace on 3/29 I had been wanting for a long time and decided to go in and ask about it. The original price quoted was around $7,600. After expressing interest, I was offered a discount and financing options, and I ultimately purchased it for just under $4,000 with a down payment and monthly installments.
After getting home and taking a closer look, I started to question the value for the price. The necklace is 14k gold with malachite, which is not a particularly rare stone. Looking more closely at the craftsmanship, I noticed small gaps between the stone and the setting, which made me feel the quality does not match the price point.
I do really love the style of the necklace, as it’s something I’ve wanted for a long time. However, I don’t feel it is worth what I paid based on the materials and overall quality.
If you’re looking for a place with friendly service and flexible payment options for a piece you like, this may be a good fit. However, if you are focused on value and pricing that closely reflects the quality of the jewelry, I would recommend taking extra time to compare before purchasing. (Pictures below, if you zoom in you can clearly see the gaps between the stone & setting)

Great experience for my first jewelry purchase ever in store. 4 stars because although the gentleman who sold to me was all around great in every customer service aspect- there was another employee who came when I selected what I wanted and was hounding me to keep looking for another item with a discount. The interaction was less of what I was hoping for and reminiscent of a used car dealer. But anyway, the store and the first customer service guy as I said was superb and they even matched a 24 hour sale for the same product from Zales. Will certainly be coming back here, though hope the upsell at a deal option from the 2nd associate won’t be.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I had an excellent experience at Valliani Jewelers in Southland Mall, Hayward! Wilfred, the sales representative, went above and beyond to help me. As someone new to the country, I appreciated his assistance in opening an account, which will help me build my credit.

I walked out with a beautiful men’s ring, and I was able to secure it with just a $10 down payment! The service was friendly and attentive, making the whole process smooth and enjoyable.

I highly recommend Valliani Jewelers to anyone looking for great service and beautiful products. Thank you, Wilfred, for your outstanding help!

I had such a great experience at Valliani Jewelry. What stood out immediately was the leadership in the store. The supervisor has created an environment that’s both fun and respectful — and honestly, that balance is rare. In many places, supervisors are either too lax (which leads to careless service) or too strict (which makes staff feel stiff and robotic). Here, it’s right in the middle. The team feels confident, professional, and genuinely happy to help.

Their approach to selling is also refreshing. They don’t just push products to make a sale. They really pay attention to what you’re looking for, make thoughtful suggestions, and treat you like you matter — not like a transaction. You actually feel special and taken care of.

At one point, a piece of an earring I was trying dropped. Instead of reacting with suspicion or awkwardness, they calmly helped me look for it and handled the situation with total grace. That told me a lot about their professionalism and trust in their customers.

Even with many people in the store, they manage to attend to everyone without making anyone feel ignored. Somehow the experience is so smooth and pleasant that you almost forget about the price tags… which is dangerous in the best way. 😄

Highly recommend!

I have purchased all my jewelry from  Valliani Jewelers in Serramonte Mall, Daly City, CA and every single time was a great experience. Amy Faustino has always  been very consistent in doing a great great job in helping me make smart decisions in choosing the best items. She is very knowledgeable about the products and will go an extra mile to make sure that you get the best deal and satisfaction that you

I highly recommend Valliani Jewelers in Daly City and for an extra peace of mind, look for Amy.  She is someone you can really trust.

googleReviews.text: Belen was incredibly helpful and made the entire process of choosing our wedding bands so easy and enjoyable. We went in without a clear idea of what we wanted, and she took the time to show us a variety of options until we found the perfect rings for our special day. She went above and beyond by thoroughly explaining everything, being completely transparent about pricing, and helping us stay within our budget. Her patience, knowledge, and excellent customer service made this such a great experience. We are so excited to get our rings and will definitely be coming back to see Belen for future jewelry purchases.
Great customer service! I purchased a Bulova watch for Father’s Day gift. Thank you Sonia and Jorge.

Went here to get a wedding band for my fiancé for our surprise wedding at our gender reveal for our baby. The reviews here were great so I thought it would be fine. I found one I liked, but it needed to be contoured to her engagement ring so they said had to be custom made. I was assured they could get it made within the time frame (5 weeks) that I needed it by. I paid for it up front when they gave me the price with the expedited service. I called just about every week to make sure things were still on schedule to get it by the date promised, and the staff were very friendly and told me that it was all good, no issues, and that I would have it by the date promised.  8 days before my wedding I get a call from them saying that the place that makes the rings for them says it will cost nearly double what I paid for it, and that they hadn’t even made it yet. I felt like I had been lied to for the last 4 weeks, and now I felt like I was being scammed.

At least they gave me my money back for nothing but wasting my time. Luckily my wife accepted the cherry ring pop I gave her on our wedding day.

Thanks, Valliani jewelers.

If I was given the correct price ahead of time or even told that they needed to check with whatever place makes the rings for them, I could’ve made an informed decision. Instead, it felt like they knew they had me in a corner with so little time before the wedding that I would pay whatever they wanted. Sad way to do business.

I’ve had such a great experience with this jewelry store that I had to come back—and once again, they did not disappoint! They previously helped me fix my ring, and this time around the service was just as amazing. The team is incredibly welcoming, and everything was handled quickly and professionally.
A special thank you to Rosie Gonzales, who assisted me this visit—she was absolutely wonderful! She was kind, attentive, and made sure everything was taken care of smoothly. It’s so nice to go somewhere where you feel valued as a customer. I highly recommend this place to anyone looking for quality service and a friendly atmosphere!

We had a wonderful experience with Valliani Jewelers. This is where I purchased my wife’s engagement ring and wedding bands, and we were able to design custom rings exactly the way we wanted. We worked closely with Belen, and she was amazing throughout the process—helpful, patient, knowledgeable, and truly a pleasure to work with.

It took a couple of weeks to receive the final rings, but it was absolutely worth the wait. The craftsmanship was beautiful, the pricing was unbeatable, and the whole experience felt personal and well cared for. My wife also purchased my wedding band there, so Valliani became a special part of our story. Highly recommended.

googleReviews.text: We had such a great experience shopping for jewelry with Emily! She was incredibly friendly, patient, and helpful throughout the entire process. She made us feel comfortable and never pressured, and she gave us such amazing discounts on the pieces we bought. You can really tell she cares about her customers and wants them to leave happy. We absolutely love our jewelry and will definitely be coming back. Thank you again, Emily!

I recently purchased a Rado Coupole Automatic Power Reserve from Valliani Jewellers and had a fantastic experience.
They have a really impressive collection of Rado watches, which made it easy to compare different models in person. I worked with Tarvinder and Shawn, who were both incredibly patient and knowledgeable. They took the time to answer all my technical questions and provided all the information I needed to feel confident in my choice.
I was particularly impressed by the technical specs—this model features the 80-hour power reserve and a Nivachron hairspring for magnetic resistance, which makes it a very practical daily wearer despite its elegant dress style.
They were also very transparent about the logistics—they explained that it takes a couple of weeks for the serial number to show up in Rado’s online registration system, which helped set my expectations since the watch wasn't found on the day of the sale. On top of the great service, they even offered a small discount. If I could give 0 stars I would. This ring was purchased on October 5 and was not received until the last week of October. From the beginning, the experience with this jewelry store was frustrating. I was repeatedly told the ring would be ready in one week, then two weeks, and eventually three weeks, with no clear communication or consistency.

I received the ring in November and have only worn it for one month. Despite minimal wear, a diamond has already fallen out. I took the ring to a different jeweler in hopes of having it repaired, but they refused to work on it due to the poor craftsmanship.

The jeweler explained that whoever made this ring attempted to create the hidden halo by repeatedly adding more gold instead of properly ordering or designing one. This caused structural issues, including chipped prongs from multiple attempts at fixing the ring. According to them, the added gold failed to properly secure the hidden halo diamonds, which is why one has already fallen out. Their concern was that if this continues, more diamonds will follow.

From the moment I first saw the ring, I noticed issues. The ring looks uneven, the hidden halo is visibly uneven, and even the center diamond is not set straight. The quality of workmanship is extremely disappointing, especially for such an important and expensive piece.

I will be providing photos to show the condition of the ring and the poor work done by this jeweler. This has been a very upsetting experience, and I would not recommend this store.

googleReviews.text: We just went for casual browsing for something cute for my wife and ended up buying this. Gina showed us variety of jewelry with great patience and was accommodating to our needs and price range. Will certainly consider coming here again.

I had an excellent experience at Valliani Jewelers. Jhovelyn and Denver were incredibly helpful, knowledgeable, and patient throughout the entire process. They took the time to answer all of my questions and made sure I felt comfortable with my purchase. Their customer service was outstanding, and they truly went above and beyond to make my experience enjoyable. If you’re looking for quality jewelry and exceptional service, I highly recommend Valliani Jewelers. Thank you, Jhovelyn and Denver, for all your help!

6 stars if I could and I hardly make reviews. Zoey was awesome with helping me choose a watch she helped me find one that I’ve been wanting for the longest time.
Denver too was quick to remove the chain links.
It was a quick, easy, and fast process thanks to these guys shouts out to them I will be coming back!

Zayn from Valliani Jewelers is the greatest sales associate ever. I was looking for a specific 18” solid 14K rope chain, and he took the time to show me several great options until I found the perfect one. The value per gram of gold was excellent, especially with how high gold prices are today.

My purchase also included free cleanings every three months and very affordable repair service if the chain ever breaks, which gave me even more confidence buying from them. They even gave me a little gift 🤭

The entire staff was welcoming, professional, and made the whole experience enjoyable. I’ll definitely be coming back to Valliani Jewelers for future pieces!

Jhovelyn and Denver helped us well with our purchase. Well explained and give us a good discount. We found our dream watch in a discounted price and the good thing is you can pay it in installment without interest. I highly recommend them for your watch needs.

The best help we could have ever asked for was from Ana! She is truly the sweetest and most wonderful person. My fiancé and I came in looking for wedding bands, and Ana made the entire experience so enjoyable.

She was incredibly patient, knowledgeable, and helpful every step of the way. Most importantly, she gave us exceptional service without ever making us feel pressured. She took the time to answer all of our questions and made sure we felt comfortable and confident with our decision.

If you’re looking for jewelry or have any specific needs, I highly recommend asking for Ana. She will take great care of you and make your experience feel special from start to finish. Thank you, Ana, for helping us find our perfect wedding bands!

★★★★★

Great experience today. Picked up two watches and the customer service was excellent from start to finish. The staff was professional, helpful, and made the whole process easy and enjoyable. Definitely recommend checking them out if you’re looking for quality jewelry or watches in Longview.
I had such a great experience at this store thanks to the sales associate Lily.She was very detail oriented in helping me pick out my gift! I would 10/10 recommend shopping here

Literally Lily was so sweet and Bradley helped us find the best deals for what we wanted. I was able to upgrade my ring with a gorgeous diamond and buy my husband a watch on sale and stay in price range. Go see them:) 🩵🩵🩵🩵

Bradley B. was very helpful with our experience in choosing a wedding band for my fiancé. He was very knowledgeable in terms of different materials. Definitely would recommend! Go see him for your jewelry needs! He also gifted me this cute tote bag!

googleReviews.text:
From the moment we walked into the store, we were greeted with such kindness and genuine hospitality. Cecy immediately helped us start looking at engagement rings and made the entire experience enjoyable and stress-free.

I had no idea what style of ring I wanted because there were so many beautiful options to choose from. She patiently helped me explore different ideas, answered all my questions, and encouraged me to try on several rings until I found the one I absolutely fell in love with. Christina was so helpful with the whole process and information She helped make sure I got the perfect size. At the same time, she assisted my fiancé in finding a ring that he loved as well.

The entire experience felt warm, personal, and welcoming. We originally came in just to do some window shopping and gather ideas as we started planning our wedding. We had no intention of purchasing that day, but the exceptional customer service and positive atmosphere made us feel so comfortable and confident in our decision.

We are beyond happy with our rings and so grateful for the wonderful experience. Thank you for helping make such a special milestone in our lives even more memorable!

I just came in just to look around, but OMG!  Maribel, James, and Sean are amazing. You will not regret coming in to the store. I’ve been to all the other jewelry stores at the mall. This one is the best price and the most friendliest, very reasonable prices, beautiful jewelry best service ever!
We got my dream ring with them! Couldn’t be happier! They got me a great price and a great size! Definitely will come back! Christina is amazing!

I accidentally stumbled upon this store, and I fell in love with everything it has to offer. Their jewelry is absolutely stunning, and the store itself is both nice and clean.  I appreciated the thoughtful touch of being offered water and coffee. The entire experience felt glamorous, especially considering the affordable prices. Alexzandra and James provided stellar customer service; they were incredibly friendly, professional, patient and kind, going above and beyond to help me find the ring I truly wanted. The store offers layaway and easy financing options. The purchasing process was fast . Overall, I had a perfect 5-star experience and highly recommend this store to anyone looking for beautiful affordable jewelry and exceptional service.

Cecy Hernandez and Alexzandra Reyes were both amazing . They were both very  helpful and their customers service was without a doubt very helpful. They made my experience of purchasing my 30th wedding anniversary/birthday rings an unforgettable experience.
I would recommend them to anyone especially my own family.
Thank you so much for making my special day/birthday an unforgettable one.

I highly suggest this location and everyone who works here.  Thank you again for helping my boyfriend pick his perfect watch.

Thank you so much.

PS. Mam Estee, Emily, Tody..

googleReviews.text: Excellent service from start to finish! Jorge is the best & was friendly, knowledgeable, and helped me find the perfect piece of jewelry. The selection was beautiful, the quality was outstanding, and the entire experience felt welcoming and stress-free. I truly appreciated the attention to detail and customer care. I highly recommend this jewelry store to anyone looking for quality jewelry and exceptional service. I'll definitely be back! Come see Jorge if you want if you want the best customer service

Very good customer service. I was at another jewelers to buy my wife some earrings and waited 15 minutes and didn’t get helped or even told they would help me soon. I walk over to Valliani Jewlers and they helped me as soon as I walked in the store. Good quality, good service and very helpful. Even when they are busy, they will let you know they will help you soon.

I recently visited Villiani Jewelers to purchase a new gold band for my husband, and I received nothing but the best customer service. The staff was knowledgeable, patient, and genuinely helpful throughout the process. They made what could have been an overwhelming purchase feel easy and special. Highly recommend! Look at the mirror finish. Polish is incredible they where the only jeweler’s that could provide me with what I wanted in the whole mall.

Jorge helped us find the PERFECT ring. He was patient and very knowledgeable with the jewelry. He got to know our family and our relationship. My soon to be husband bought me a ring years ago and throughout the years it lost 2 diamonds, Jorge made it possible to fix the diamonds at no extra charge to us. He also included 2 sets of earrings for my daughters. We appreciate what you did for us. I also loved the encouragement he gave me to choose the big ring lol! He said after 9 years and 4 kids you deserve it and I couldn’t agree more!! Thank you once again (:

In the most honest way possible, Big thanks to Estefany and Kevin. They treated me like family ;) They were beyond flexible with me and did not push whatsoever. Instead, I genuinely felt like I was able to speak and they’d listen. I pick up on things like that when making a large purchase so big Thankyou for that. Another thing I want to add that enhanced the experience:  the piece I wanted originally had sold earlier that day… not a sweat for estefany & Kevin. Mentally I timed it, & I’d estimate that within about 3 minutes, they sourced the exact piece I wanted originally. I paid, signed, and from start to finish I was in and out in about 30 minutes. Thankyou Valliani for help making this process easy and smooth!

googleReviews.text: I came to the store because I had some concerns, and Arnold took great care of us. He has an amazing personality and made us feel comfortable from the moment we walked in. He invited us to sit down, listened carefully, and paid attention to every detail. That is why we never go to any other jewelry store. Even after he left, we continued to follow him because he has always taken good care of us and shared his expertise. Arnold is not just selling jewelry he truly understands his customers’ needs and goes above and beyond to help them. He listens, cares, and provides exceptional customer service. We appreciate everything he has done for us, and we will always be loyal customers. We love this guy and highly recommend him to anyone looking for honesty, professionalism, and outstanding service.

I had such an amazing experience purchasing our wedding ring. From the moment we walked in, the customer service was truly above and beyond. Arnold was so patient, knowledgeable, and genuinely cared about helping us find the perfect ring for such a special moment in our lives.

The attention to detail, kindness, and professionalism made the entire experience unforgettable and stress-free. We never felt rushed, and every question was answered with care. We absolutely love the ring and will gladly recommend to family and friends.

Went to see Arnold P. today and found the ring of my dreams! I've been buying my jewelry from him for over 20 years and he always takes such good care of me! He's  very knowledgeable, professional and such a delight to deal with. I love this store and the outstanding quality and selection of their jewelry! Thank you again Arnold for such a pleasant experience! I will be back to see you again my friend! 💜😊

Went to another jewelry store and bought something, then I decided to visit a new store and met Arnold. He was very friendly and welcomed us like family. I decided to buy a bracelet, and I am very happy with his service, knowledge, and professionalism. He is a great person and an excellent salesman. I would highly recommend Valliani Jewelers to all my family and friends. Great personality and outstanding customer service!

Mr. Arnold Prepena was very knowledgeable and helpful when my husband and I went to shop for a  diamond ring for my 37 year anniversary. My husband gave me a 1.30 carat natural diamond engagement ring in 1989. We decided to get a bigger one for our 37 years anniversary.
Arnold was a great help during the process. He educated us on the difference between natural diamonds and lab grown diamonds. Because of the information he provided, we decided to purchased a lab grown diamond with 3.5 carat center diamond and smaller diamonds on each side.
We saved a lot of money by purchasing the lab grown diamond and gained an amazingly beautiful ring. We are very pleased with Arnold’s professionalism and genuine dedication in providing excellent customer service.
We highly recommend Arnold and Valliani Jewelry Store to anyone who is looking to purchase any type of jewelry.
Thank you,
CC and Lita Motes
